# SAMPLE_DATA

Minimal fixture sample data. One entity, one happy sample referenced by the
PLAYWRIGHT_FLOWS spec via `valueFromSample: "Greeting.happy-default.name"`.

## Greeting (`entity-greeting`)

- Used by requirements: REQ-1 (primary-user)

### Sample happy: happy-default

```json
{
  "name": "Avery"
}
```
